reviews.review_title: One of the best gorilla tag fan games
reviews.review_description: The day I downloaded this game I met the moderators and they were nice although the map was empty but I did not care because I wanted to see what kind of maps there were I entered the shop and I bought myself some cosmetics and I liked it and I went to zero gravity I was flying until I hit the wall and slowly started to stop I had been stuck there for days  but I finally got out and checked out ice map it looked like slides for some reason but I had fun and got stuck again and then as updates went by i had been waiting for a change for the forest map that update came out along with a statue new cosmetics and more updates went by a bed appeared and a crack on a wall and then more changes to forest where you spawn at inside a wall with the computer and a mirror and also more cosmtics and I purchased all of the cosmetics and then one update everything changed a new map new cosmetics and then I stopped playing and then I played again noticing I could not join any server and that's when my friend told me that the game shut  down because of kids asking for mod and that was the last time I ever  heard from gorilla Pepsi but is one of my favorite games I ever played.
